name: tpl-freight-dispatch
description: Freight Dispatcher (物流調度員) — pull shipment manifest from TMS, AI-rank driver assignments, push to driver app, generate shipping label, monitor delivery status with exception handling. Replace TMS and driver-app externalUrl with your logistics provider endpoints (e.g. MercuryGate, McLeod, project44).

steps.notifyMsg: Driver acceptance failed for shipment {{shipment_id}}. Assigned driver: {{steps.rank-drivers.output.top_driver_name}} ({{steps.rank-drivers.output.top_driver_id}}). Acceptance status: {{steps.push-driver-assignment.output.acceptance_status}}. Origin: {{origin_depot}} → {{destination_address}}. Manual reassignment required — ranked alternatives: {{steps.rank-drivers.output.ranked_drivers}}.

Shipment {{shipment_id}} delivered successfully. Driver: {{steps.rank-drivers.output.top_driver_name}}. Origin: {{origin_depot}} → {{destination_address}}. Label: {{steps.generate-label.output.label_id}}. Delivered at: {{steps.query-delivery-status.output.delivered_at}}. POD reference: {{steps.query-delivery-status.output.pod_reference}}.

Delivery exception for shipment {{shipment_id}}. Status: {{steps.query-delivery-status.output.delivery_status}}. Driver: {{steps.rank-drivers.output.top_driver_name}} ({{steps.rank-drivers.output.top_driver_id}}). Route: {{origin_depot}} → {{destination_address}}. Exception details: {{steps.query-delivery-status.output.exception_reason}}. Last known location: {{steps.query-delivery-status.output.last_location}}. Dispatcher intervention required.
